query:
-- Verify the SasBoss Voice services were assigned
SELECT externalId, planName, customerName, customerExternalId, status
FROM services
WHERE externalId IN ('SS1NJNTP', 'SSL0OO3Q', 'SSQ16U1I', 'SSWDCLAW', 'SSORVHG1', 'SS4HTBPC', 'SSWJNY05', 'SSNHX6ZD', 'SS011MSO')
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute
